tissueExpression.summary: Cytoplasmic and membranous expression in most tissues.

verification.description: Medium consistency between antibody staining and RNA expression data. Pending external verification.

data.tissue: Cervical Squamous Cell Carcinoma and Endocervical Adenocarcinoma (TCGA)
Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (TCGA)

cellExpression.summary: Mainly localized to the cell junctions and cytosol. In addition localized to the nucleoli fibrillar center.

rnaSpecificity.description: nTPM >= 1 in at least one tissue but not elevated in any tissue

data.tissue: Somatosensory cortex, postcentral gyrus, ventral (white matter)
Ventrolateral tegmental area, A5 NE cell group

rnaSpecificity.description: nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
nTPM >= 1 in at least one cancer but not elevated in any cancer
At least four-fold higher mRNA levels in a particular immune cell as compared to average levels in all immune cells
At least four-fold higher mRNA levels in a particular cell type as compared to all other cell types

cellTypeExpression.cellTypeExpressionCluster: Elongating spermatids - Sperm cell metabolism & fertilization

tissueExpression.summary: Moderate to strong cytoplasmic and membranous staining was observed in most normal tissues. Cells in CNS, hepatocytes, lymphoid tissues and muscle cells were generally negative.
tissueExpression.validation: Medium consistency between antibody staining and RNA expression data

image.description: Immunohistochemical staining of human breast shows strong cytoplasmic and membranous positivity in glandular cells.

tissueExpression.summary: A majority of malignant cells showed moderate to strong cytoplasmic immunoreactivity. Malignant gliomas, lymphomas and melanomas as well as testicular and thyroid cancers were generally negative.

image.description: Immunofluorescent staining of human cell line RT-4 shows localization to nucleoli fibrillar center, cell junctions and cytosol.

verification.description: Pass with quality comment low specificity (binding to 1-2 antigens >15% and <40%).

tissueExpression.summary: Estimation of protein expression could not be performed. View primary data.

verification.description: RNA-based expert annotation gave inconclusive results. Pending external verification.

rnaSpecificity.description: At least four-fold higher mRNA levels in a particular tissue as compared to average levels in all tissues

data.tissue: Somatosensory cortex, postcentral gyrus, ventral (white matter)
Ventrolateral tegmental area, A5 NE cell group

rnaSpecificity.description: nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
nTPM >= 1 in at least one region but not elevated in any region
At least four-fold higher mRNA levels in a group of 2-5 cancers

tissueExpression.summary: Distinct staining was observed in connective tissue. Heart muscle displayed strong cytoplasmic positivity. Moderate nuclear and cytoplasmic positivity was observed in respiratory epithelia, Purkinje cells, neuronal cells of cerebral cortex, renal tubules, hepatocytes, rectum, salivary gland, smooth muscle cells, stomach, testis and thyroid. Remaining normal tissues were weakly stained or negative.
tissueExpression.validation: Low consistency between antibody staining and RNA expression data
Partly consistent with gene/protein characterization data

image.description: Immunohistochemical staining of human small intestine shows strong positivity in vessel wall.

tissueExpression.summary: Most testicular cancers along with several melanomas, gliomas, urothelial, colorectal, prostate, ovarian and cervical cancers displayed moderate nuclear positivity. Remaining cancer tissues were mainly negative.

verification.description: Pass with single peak corresponding to interaction only with its own antigen.

tissueExpression.summary: Most normal tissues showed moderate to strong cytoplasmic and membranous positivity. Squamous epithelium, prostatic glands and soft tissues were weakly stained or negative.
tissueExpression.validation: Low consistency between antibody staining and RNA expression data
Partly consistent with gene/protein characterization data

image.description: Immunohistochemical staining of human kidney shows strong cytoplasmic and membranous positivity in renal tubules.

tissueExpression.summary: Cancer tissues showed weak to moderate cytoplasmic and membranous positivity. A few liver and colorectal cancers exhibited strong immunoreactivity. Several gliomas, carcinoids, lung, cervical, urothelia, prostate and renal cancers were weakly stained or negative.
